hypothesis: Scalar damping changes did not remove the right-exact overshoot, indicating that world-frame planar correction and yaw leg differentials are mechanically coupled. Reducing post-recovery hip and abduction yaw authority together should limit contact-driven angular momentum without changing the command or recovery.
expectedEffect: Retain world-frame signed progress while bringing right-exact yaw overshoot below 1.0 rad/s, keeping transitions settled, and preserving pre-impact, recovery, and no-fall regressions.
